history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A wide shot captures two individuals from the chest up, standing on a grassy, shrub-covered mountain peak. The sky above is a mix of pale blue with scattered, wispy gray clouds. The background features rolling hills covered in dense green foliage, with rugged, rocky outcrops and a prominent, distant mountain peak shrouded in a slight haze.

The person on the left wears a blue hooded jacket with the hood pulled up, obscuring most of their face except for sunglasses and a scarf or fabric covering their lower face. Their left arm is extended outwards, bent at the elbow, with their hand open. The jacket has a grey panel on the chest and sleeves.

The person on the right is dressed in a black hooded jacket, also with the hood up, concealing their face with sunglasses and a dark fabric. They are holding their hands together in a prayer-like gesture in front of their chest. The black jacket has a visible zipper and some subtle text on the right sleeve. Both individuals appear to be wearing dark shorts.

The lighting suggests it's either early morning or late afternoon, with a soft, diffused light illuminating the scene. The overall color palette is dominated by greens and blues, with the dark clothing of the individuals providing a strong contrast. The mood is adventurous and perhaps a little mysterious due to the obscured faces. The style is realistic, as if captured by a camera during an outdoor excursion.
